text: All comparables have been found in the subject's neighborhood on the eastside of Bloomington, IL and were selected to demonstrate the marketability of houses of a similar location, design, age, GLA, room count, and basement finish. Due to recent market trends the comparables have received a market time adjustment based on the sales statistics chart included in this report. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its [ADJUSTMENTS]. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its [ADJUSTMENTS]. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its [ADJUSTMENTS]. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of market value.
